evidence.source_title: Why UK Is Imposing Sanctions on Founder of Ayandeh Bank - Kayhan Life
evidence.description: Reports link Iran Mall International Development Company to a financial network around the Khamenei family. Mojtaba Khamenei attended the funeral of Ansari's father.

editorial_notes: Connection is indirect, through Mojtaba Khamenei. Ali Khamenei is mentioned in the bio as Supreme Leader whose son has alleged ties to Ansari.
